UW-9  DESIGN OF WELDED JOINTS. (a) Welded joints shall be designed to develop the full strength of the weaker of the parts joined, considering the joint efficiency from UW-12. (b) Butt joints shall be of the full penetration type, except as permitted by UW-3 for certain Category C and D joints. (c) The details of welded joint design shall conform to the acceptable joint types listed in this paragraph. Joint design shall account for the loading conditions of UG-22 and the minimum thickness requirements of UG-27. See also UW-15 for joint design details. Postweld heat treatment shall be performed as required by UW-28.
